sections.title: If Xilo and Fabia have not been reunited

lines.speaker: Xilo
lines.text: I can't believe she's done this.

lines.speaker: Xilo
lines.text: Fabia! She asked me to meet her, and I quote, 'by the special tree'. You may notice that she isn't here! I've been waiting for hours!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you think she might just be delayed?

lines.speaker: Xilo
lines.text: I know her too well. She wouldn't be delayed coming to see me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you be at the wrong special tree?

lines.speaker: Xilo
lines.text: No! This is the one, singular, special tree!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Humour me for just a moment. What if, amongst this entire rainforest, there's a second very similar tree?

lines.speaker: Xilo
lines.text: And Fabia would find herself at the wrong tree in this scenario?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Or maybe it's you who is at the wrong one?

lines.speaker: Xilo
lines.text: No, absolutely not! I know where to meet Fabia and I wouldn't miss any opportunity to do so!

lines.speaker: Xilo
lines.text: This was the tree where we first met. It was a lovely day! A botanical tour of the rainforest, but the only thing I found myself looking at was her...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I'm sure the two of you will find each other soon. However, I do suspect that might happen sooner if you considered looking by some other trees...

lines.speaker: Xilo
lines.text: Hmm... I'll think about it, but for now, I'll wait here a while longer.

sections.title: If Xilo and Fabia have been reunited

lines.speaker: Xilo
lines.text: Hello again, iknami! Thank you for helping us find each other!

lines.speaker: Fabia
lines.text: To think we were waiting by different trees! It was so silly of us!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I'm happy to see you together again. Now, I'm sure you have a lot of catching up to do. I'll leave you to it.
